    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addAction(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Answer.Builder
    Adds an action executed when this answer is selected.
    addAnswer(Answer) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds an answer option to this page.
    addCallback(DialogueCallback) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Answer.Builder
    Adds a callback invoked when this answer is selected.
    addCondition(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Answer.Builder
    Adds a condition required for this answer to be available.
    addExitAction(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds an action to be executed when the dialogue exits from this page.
    addExitCallback(DialogueCallback) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds a callback to be invoked when the dialogue exits from this page.
    addLine(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds a dialogue line to this page.
    addPage(Page) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Dialogue.Builder
    Adds a page to this dialogue.
    addPostAction(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds an action to be executed after the page completes.
    addPostCallback(DialogueCallback) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds a callback to be invoked after the page completes.
    addPreAction(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds an action to be executed before the page is shown.
    addPreCallback(DialogueCallback) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Page.Builder
    Adds a callback to be invoked before the page is shown.
    addReplyMessage(String) - Method in class org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Answer.Builder
    Adds a reply chat/message sent when this answer is selected.
    Answer - Class in org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders
    Immutable answer option on a Page.
    Answer.Builder - Class in org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders
    Builder for Answer instances.
